case_title: BRANDON HOPPMAN VS. GREENTECH HOME, A CALIFORNIA FTB SUSPENDED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOPPMAN, BRANDON AS TO DEFENDANT GREENTECH HOME, A CALIFORNIA FTB SUSPENDED CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOPPMAN, BRANDON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREENTECH HOME, A CALIFORNIA FTB SUSPENDED CORPORATION $4,345.87 PRINCIPAL, $4.79 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,575.66, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
